summary: Phase 3 Mezzo Pricing Matrix — both backend and frontend fully verified. 8/8 pytest tests PASS and 11/11 Playwright UI assertions PASS. Admin GET/PUT, token gating, validation errors, idempotent seeding, catalog with real prices, and the full /branding-admin grid editor (tier switching, product switching, edit→save→persist, paste-from-Excel TSV fill, Reload discard) all behave per spec.
critical_code_review_comments: mezzo_prices.py:save_prices() — sanitisation silently drops unknown bucket/adder keys. This is by design per the docstring but could mask Howard accidentally pasting from the wrong product's grid. Consider returning a list of dropped keys in the response so the UI can warn.

MezzoPricingPanel.jsx:10 — fmt() uses toFixed(2) but cells use input_value() that shows raw e.g. '259.608'. Confirmed via testing the table cells render the raw 3-decimal seed value (good — no precision loss). Note that fmt() helper appears unused in the input path; only used for read-only contexts (if any).
routes/mezzo.py:save_prices roundtrip — PUT returns the saved doc but does NOT include _id (Mongo upsert). Code correctly excludes _id via project. OK.
seed_data_creation: None. Test edited whole-sale Mezzo Double Hung cell [1][0] to 888.88 then restored to 281.208 (original). All other data unchanged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Mezzo pricing matrix is complete and stable. Backend endpoints: GET/PUT /api/admin/mezzo/prices (admin-token gated) and GET /api/mezzo/catalog (contractor JWT). MongoDB collection: db.mezzo_prices with unique (tier, product_type) index. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_mezzo_pricing.py. Frontend testids: mezzo-pricing-panel, mezzo-pricing-tier-{tier}, mezzo-pricing-product-{product}, mezzo-cell-{row}-{col}, mezzo-pricing-save-btn, mezzo-pricing-reload-btn. Paste-from-Excel works via native ClipboardEvent('paste') with DataTransfer text/plain TSV.

verified_acceptance_criteria.BE_get_with_token: PASS — full 4×4 matrix returned; whole-sale DH 32-73 UI == 259.608
verified_acceptance_criteria.BE_catalog_real_prices: PASS — DH base 32-73 UI=259.608; Tempered Full kind=sqft rate=9.18
verified_acceptance_criteria.BE_seed_idempotent_16_docs: PASS — count remains 16 after two seed calls
verified_acceptance_criteria.FE_dirty_state_save: PASS — save enabled on edit, disabled after PUT success, value persists across reload
verified_acceptance_criteria.FE_paste_from_excel: PASS — TSV 111\t222\n333\t444 filled rightward+downward from focused cell
verified_acceptance_criteria.FE_reload_discards: PASS — unsaved edit reverted to 329.352 after Reload button
